title: Parent/Guardian Email Drafter
description: Draft a professional email to a parent or guardian from a few bullet points.
template: Draft a professional, {tone}, and concise email to a parent or guardian from these key points: {keyPointsToCommunicate}. Include a clear subject line suggestion. Leave placeholders like [Student Name] and [Date] instead of guessing details I haven't given you.

fields.label: Key points to communicate
fields.placeholder: List key points (no student names — use [Student Name]).
